vectorcode.nextEditSuggestions.enabled.name: VectorCodeNextEditSuggestions
vectorcode.nextEditSuggestions.enabled.description: Whether to enable next edit suggestions (NES). NES can propose a next edit based on your recent changes.

vectorcode.chat.reviewSelection.enabled.name: VectorCodeReviewSelection
vectorcode.chat.reviewSelection.enabled.description: Enables code review on current selection.

vectorcode.chat.claudeAgent.enabled.name: Claude3PIntegration
vectorcode.chat.claudeAgent.enabled.description: Enable Claude Agent sessions in VS Code. Start and resume agentic coding sessions powered by Anthropic Claude Agent SDK directly in the editor. Uses your existing VectorCode subscription.
